hooks.command:
rsync -a --delete --exclude='.git' /Users/deboramarsalbarros/Desktop/Plutto/landing/ /tmp/plutto-landing/ && cat > /tmp/plutto_serve.py << 'PYEOF'
import http.server
import os
os.chdir("/tmp/plutto-landing")
class Handler(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
    def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(*args, directory="/tmp/plutto-landing", **kwargs)
http.server.HTTPServer(("", 3000), Handler).serve_forever()
PYEOF
